code:
#Start code here
from turtle import *
turtle = Turtle()
screen = Screen()
turtle.speed(0)
screen.bgcolor("black")
colours = "red","purple","blue","green","orange","yellow"
for i in range(360):
  turtle.color(colours[i % 6])
  turtle.width(i / 100 + 1)
  turtle.forward(i)
  turtle.left(59)
